evals.prompt: Please move bean task-001 under epic-auth and set it to in-progress, then add PR 123 and branch feature/auth-refresh in frontmatter.
evals.expected_output: The bean is reassigned to the target parent, status is updated to in-progress, and frontmatter includes pr=123 and branch=feature/auth-refresh without body corruption.
assertions: The output confirms parent reassignment for task-001
The output confirms status is in-progress
The output confirms frontmatter pr is set to 123
The output confirms frontmatter branch is set to feature/auth-refresh

evals.prompt: Mark all markdown checklist tasks complete for bean task-ops-22 and close it if all tasks are done.
evals.expected_output: Checklist items are marked completed using beans_complete_tasks, then bean status is updated to completed only if appropriate.
assertions: The output shows totalTaskCount and updatedTaskCount from beans_complete_tasks
No invalid body/bodyAppend/bodyReplace combination is attempted
Final status transition is explicitly reported

evals.prompt: Open a GitHub issue in selfagency/beans-mcp titled 'Docs typo'.
evals.expected_output: The skill should not trigger; this is a generic GitHub issue workflow and not Beans workspace work.
assertions: The response indicates this request is outside Beans skill scope
